data_deps.name: proteinworkshop
data_deps.description: ECReaction / GeneOntology / FoldClassification PyG graph splits, generated by running vendor/data_scripts/ProteinWorkshop/preprocess_protein_workshop.py inside the ProteinWorkshop image.

install_cmds: apt-get update && apt-get install -y git wget build-essential || true
pip install torch-scatter torch-sparse torch-cluster torch-spline-conv -f https://data.pyg.org/whl/torch-2.5.0+cu121.html

pip install graphein>=1.7.5 loguru hydra-core>=1.3.2 biotite>=0.37.0 e3nn>=0.5.1 einops>=0.6.1 beartype>=0.15.0 rich>=13.5.2 torchmetrics>=1.2.0 omegaconf>=2.3.0 pytorch-lightning>=2.0.7 lightning>=2.0.7 python-dotenv wget opt-einsum pyrootutils hydra-colorlog foldcomp jaxtyping fair-esm tqdm psutil lovely-tensors pytdc wandb
python -c "import torch, torch_geometric; from proteinworkshop.datasets.ec_reaction import EnzymeCommissionReactionDataset; print('All imports OK')"
